sections.title: Human Oversight for High-Risk AI
sections.text: High-risk systems must enable effective human oversight and intervention before impactful actions are executed.

sections.title: Risk Management System
sections.text: Providers must implement continuous risk identification, analysis, evaluation, and mitigation throughout operation.

sections.title: EHDS Interoperability Principle
sections.text: Health data exchanges should follow secure, interoperable, and purpose-limited transmission practices.

sections.title: Remote Triage and Referral
sections.text: Severe respiratory distress, chest pain, neurological deficits, or persistent high fever should trigger urgent escalation pathways.

sections.title: Access Barriers and Transportation
sections.text: When transportation barriers are present, care coordination should prioritize mobile clinics, community transport, and tele-support options.
